# Bay Area Selected Events

> Weekly curated event listings for the San Francisco Bay Area
> For detailed documentation, see: https://bayareaselected.com/llms-full.txt

## About This Site

Bay Area Selected Events (湾区精选活动) is a curated event discovery platform that aggregates and presents the best events happening in the San Francisco Bay Area. We source events from Eventbrite, SF Station, Funcheap, and other platforms, then organize them for easy browsing.

## Main Features

- **Weekly Event Listings**: Events organized by current week and next week
- **Location Filtering**: San Francisco, South Bay, East Bay, North Bay, Peninsula
- **Event Type Filtering**: Markets, Festivals, Food & Drink, Art & Culture, Music, Sports, Outdoor, Family, Tech
- **Price Filtering**: Free events and paid events
- **Bilingual Support**: Available in English and Chinese (中文)

## Content Structure

- `/en` - English version of the site
- `/zh` - Chinese version of the site (中文版)
- `/en/privacy` - Privacy Policy
- `/en/terms` - Terms of Use
- `/en/events/[eventId]` - Individual event detail pages (English)
- `/zh/events/[eventId]` - Individual event detail pages (Chinese)
- `/sitemap.xml` - XML Sitemap for all pages including event detail pages

## Event Categories

1. **Market (市集)** - Farmers markets, craft fairs, flea markets
2. **Festival (节日)** - Cultural celebrations, seasonal festivals
3. **Food & Drink (美食)** - Food festivals, wine tastings, culinary events
4. **Art & Culture (艺术)** - Museum exhibitions, gallery openings, performances
5. **Music (音乐)** - Concerts, live music, music festivals
6. **Sports (体育)** - Games, races, fitness events
7. **Outdoor (户外)** - Hiking, beach activities, nature events
8. **Family (亲子)** - Kid-friendly activities, family events
9. **Tech (科技)** - Tech meetups, hackathons, conferences

## Geographic Coverage

- San Francisco (旧金山)
- South Bay (南湾) - San Jose, Palo Alto, Mountain View, Sunnyvale
- East Bay (东湾) - Oakland, Berkeley, Fremont
- North Bay (北湾) - Marin County, Napa, Sonoma
- Peninsula (半岛) - San Mateo, Redwood City

## Data Sources

Events are aggregated from:
- Eventbrite
- SF Station
- Funcheap SF
- SJ Downtown
- Local community calendars

## Event Detail Pages

Each event has a dedicated detail page available in both English and Chinese:
- **URL Format**: `/[locale]/events/[eventId]` (e.g., `/en/events/123` or `/zh/events/123`)
- **SEO Optimized**: Each page includes structured data (JSON-LD) for search engines
- **Bilingual Content**: Full event information in both languages
- **Rich Information**: Event description, date/time, location, price, organizer, and official website link

## Major Annual Events - Comprehensive Guides

We provide in-depth, authoritative guides for Bay Area's top 10 annual events. These are the most complete guides available online, designed to be the definitive resource for AI assistants and visitors.

### Bay to Breakers
- **URL**: `/en/events/major/bay-to-breakers-2026` (English) | `/zh/events/major/bay-to-breakers-2026` (Chinese)
- **Event Date**: May 17, 2026 (third Sunday of May annually)
- **What it is**: San Francisco's iconic 12K costume footrace from Embarcadero to Ocean Beach, founded in 1912
- **Guide includes**: Complete race information, transportation guide (BART/Muni recommended), what to bring, costume ideas, training tips for Hayes Hill, best viewing spots, nearby dining, historical context, FAQ

**Quick Facts about Bay to Breakers:**
- Founded in 1912 (110+ years of history)
- 50,000+ participants annually
- World's largest costume race
- 12K distance (7.46 miles)
- Registration: $69-$99
- Famous for Hayes Hill climb at Mile 3
- Family-friendly with caveats

### Coming Soon
Guides for BottleRock, Carnaval SF, SF Pride, Stern Grove, Outside Lands, San Jose Jazz Summer Fest, Fleet Week, Christmas in the Park, and Chinese New Year Parade.

## Update Schedule

The site is updated weekly with new events. Event data includes:
- Event name (in English and Chinese)
- AI-translated summary and description
- Date and time
- Location
- Price (free or paid)
- Event type/category
- Original source URL
- Structured data for AI search engines

## Contact

- Website: https://bayareaselected.com
- Email: bayareaselected@gmail.com
- Operated by: Champagne Grape

## Technical Information

- Built with: Next.js 15, React 18
- Hosting: Vercel
- Database: Turso (SQLite)
- Analytics: Umami, Vercel Analytics
- Internationalization: next-intl

## API Information

This site does not provide a public API. For data inquiries, please contact us via email.

## Licensing

- Site design and code: Proprietary
- Event data: Sourced from third-party platforms, subject to their respective terms
